articles.title: Breathable hydrogel keeps ECG signals steady through workouts and 10 days of wear

articles.title: SpaceX just launched the 1st-ever nuclear-powered commercial satellite
articles.summary: A satellite aboard SpaceX's Transporter-17 rideshare mission is the first commercially designed and operated spacecraft to harness nuclear energy in orbit.

articles.title: NASA just found a planet 'hiding' in TESS spacecraft data, all thanks to Einstein
articles.summary: NASA's exoplanet-hunting spacecraft TESS has a new method for detecting worlds beyond the solar system, and it is thanks to Einstein.

articles.title: Black holes buried in mysterious 'little red dot' galaxies could blast cosmic ghosts at Earth
articles.summary: Mysterious "little red dots" discovered in the early universe by the James Webb Space Telescope could harbor buried black holes that fire high-energy neutrinos through the cosmos.

articles.title: Study: Biodiversity hotspots in American West face extinction
articles.summary: A comprehensive study of more than 1,100 springs in the American West warns that critical biodiversity hot spots are facing a mounting extinction crisis.

articles.title: UK museums at 'sharp end' of climate change challenge

articles.title: Nearby super-Earth GJ 3378b may be a good candidate for life
